title: iris hexagona var. flexicaulis
intro: Iris hexagona var. flexicaulis is a type of flowering plant, also known as a variant of the Blue Flag Iris, native to North America. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Iris hexagona var. flexicaulis include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Iris hexagona var. flexicaulis is typically prepared as a tincture, salve, or infusible herbal remedy, often used in homeopathic and natural medicine practices.
